reforms.description: The Ministry of Finance updated and revised the regulation of Skattefunn, the tax credit scheme for research and development, to codify practice and unify it with state aid regulations.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The revision aims to enhance the effectiveness of the R&D tax credit scheme, encouraging more private sector investment in research and development.
reforms.status_evidence: The regulation was updated and revised as of 2011.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant update to an existing instrument, aiming to improve the coherence and effectiveness of R&D funding mechanisms.
reforms.source_quote: As of 2011, the Ministry of Finance updated and revised the regulation of Skattefunn, the tax credit scheme for research and development.
